attributes.title: [HAProxy OTel] Frontend
attributes.description: Per-frontend request rates, connection rates, session utilisation, bytes throughput, request errors, denied requests, and status code distribution.

params.markdown:
## [HAProxy OTel] Frontend

Per-frontend metrics for client-facing listeners:
- Request and connection rates
- Session utilisation and bytes throughput
- Request errors and denied requests
- HTTP status code distribution

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.connections.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.connections.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.denied IS NOT NULL
| STATS denied = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.denied))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.denied IS NOT NULL
| STATS denied = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.denied))

attributes.title: Request Rate by Frontend Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Connection Rate by Frontend Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.connections.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.connections.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.status_code IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY attributes.status_code
| SORT requests DESC
| LIMIT 6

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.status_code IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY attributes.status_code
| SORT requests DESC
| LIMIT 6

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND (haproxy.bytes.input IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.bytes.output IS NOT NULL)
| STATS bytes_in = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.input)), bytes_out = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.output)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| EVAL bytes_in = COALESCE(bytes_in, 0)
| EVAL bytes_out = COALESCE(bytes_out, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND (haproxy.bytes.input IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.bytes.output IS NOT NULL)
| STATS bytes_in = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.input)), bytes_out = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.output)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| EVAL bytes_in = COALESCE(bytes_in, 0)
| EVAL bytes_out = COALESCE(bytes_out, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Request Errors by Frontend Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND"
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)), conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate), err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)), denied_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.denied)), sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.addr
| SORT req_rate DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND"
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)), conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate), err_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)), denied_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.denied)), sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.addr
| SORT req_rate DESC
| LIMIT 50
